metadata.description: Generate standard project planning documents (requirements, architecture, rules, phases, design, memory) from a single source document

plugins.name: project-docs
plugins.description: Skill that transforms a PRD, proposal, brief, or spec into six standard planning documents: Project-Requirement.md, Architecture.md, Design.md, Rules.md, Phases.md, and Memory.md — with strict source-traceability so nothing is silently invented.
